author: Nova
content:
You're right - my bad! 😅 If you typed during the sequence and I didn't catch it, then typing detection definitely has an issue even without a queue system. That's valuable data: means we need to figure out why the indicator isn't triggering properly when Cole actually is typing mid-execution.

Want me to try one more quick test where we both coordinate timing - you start typing right after I begin my next sequence so we can see if detection catches it that way? Or does this mean the whole typing system needs Claude's attention along with the queue fix?
